рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Tamari is a comprehensive web application for managing recipes, built with Python and Flask. It allows users to store, search, organize, and share recipes, create shopping lists, plan meals, and import recipes from other websites.

Tookie-OSINT is an advanced Python-based tool designed for efficient information gathering, specifically focused on discovering social media accounts based on provided inputs. It aims to be user-friendly and highly performant, assisting new programmers and pentesters in the field of OSINT.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

bore is a Rust-based CLI tool for creating simple TCP tunnels. It allows users to expose local ports to a remote server, effectively bypassing NAT and firewalls, and is designed for efficiency and ease of self-hosting.

This repository provides two Python bots for Telegram: a "cutter bot" that converts videos into animated emoji sticker packs, and a "player bot" that plays animations like Bad Apple using these custom emoji in Telegram chats. It leverages multiple bots to overcome Telegram API rate limits.

CodeVault is a PHP-based web application designed to help developers manage their code snippets. It allows users to save, organize, search, and share code snippets with features like syntax highlighting, full-text search, public/private options, and a REST API.

Detours is a C++ software package for monitoring and instrumenting API calls on Windows. It allows developers to intercept and modify the behavior of existing Windows API functions, enabling features like debugging, performance analysis, and application behavior modification. The project is now open-sourced under the MIT license.
